skill.body:
# Audit Trail Management
## Overview This skill ensures that every create, update, and delete operation within the asset management system is logged with full traceability, supporting compliance, forensic investigation, and operational transparency.
## Audit Log Contents - **Timestamp**: Exact date and time of the action - **Actor**: User who performed the action - **Action Type**: Create, Update, Delete, Status Change, Assignment - **Entity Affected**: Which record and table was modified - **Before/After Values**: Field-level change tracking
## Key Responsibilities - Ensure all system events are captured in the AuditLog entity - Review audit logs for suspicious or unauthorized activity - Generate compliance reports based on audit data - Retain audit records per organizational data retention policies - Restrict audit log access to Admin role only
## Use Cases - Investigating asset discrepancies or missing records - Validating compliance with procurement policies - Supporting internal and external audits
## Related Entities - AuditLog, Asset, User
skill.description: Ability to implement, maintain, and analyze comprehensive audit trails for all asset management system transactions, ensuring accountability and compliance.
skill.name: Audit Trail Management
